findings.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) is a web security policy mechanism whereby a web server declares that complying user agents (such as a web browser) are to interact with it using only secure HTTPS connections (i.e. HTTP layered over TLS/SSL). HSTS is an IETF standards track protocol and is specified in RFC 6797.
findings.solution: Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is configured to enforce Strict-Transport-Security.
